notes: Added Link import from next/link and useWorkspace import. Added firstProcessTab derivation (first tab with canvas_type==='process', fallback to tabs[0]). Added guidance link 'Open the canvas to set maturity scores →' below the disabled Generate Summary button, shown only when !hasGapData && firstProcessTab. Wrapped the idle/null block in a React fragment to accommodate both the existing div and the new hint paragraph.
